'''''Archai''''' was a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]]<ref name="GatORW" /> manufactured by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]<ref name="SotG" /> and owned by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Coli Carinth]]. While Carinth operated the ''Archai'', she became one of a few [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxies]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] with the coordinates required to travel to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Iego/Legends|Iego]] through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="GatORW" />

At some point the members of the [[Diathim/Legends|Diathim]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the planet subverted Carinth's mind causing her to guide travelers to Iego, subsequently strand them there, and leave without any recollection of her actions. In order to protect the coordinates of Iego from her customers, Carinth would require them to [[Slave circuit|link]] their [[Starship/Legends|starships]] to the ''Archai''{{'}}s [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] thus protecting the coordinates.<ref name="GatORW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Archai'' was mentioned in the ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', a [[2004]] sourcebook for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] and written by [[Craig Robert Carey]], [[Jason Fry]], [[Jeff Quick]], [[Jeffrey Quinn]], and [[Daniel Wallace]].<ref name="GatORW" />
